zh.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar是Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar的女兒，於1360年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯。她於1388年與Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1408年10月26日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年48歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar是Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar的女儿，于1360年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯。她于1388年与Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1408年10月26日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年48岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Isabell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella

en.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar was born in 1360, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland as the daughter of Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar. She married Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar in 1388, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 26 October 1408, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 48, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar est née en 1360, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse, fille de Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar. Elle a épousé Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar en 1388, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 octobre 1408, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar wurde 1360 in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar geboren. Sie hat 1388 in Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. Oktober 1408 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar è nata il nel 1360 nel Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland come figlia di Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar. Lei sposato Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar nel 1388, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 26 ottobre 1408, nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Marは1360年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスでSir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Marの娘として生まれた。1388年にイギリススコットランドでSir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Marと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1408年10月26日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーで48歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar(은)는 1360년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1388년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 10월 26일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar nasceu em 1360, em Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland filha de Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar. Ela casou-se com Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar em 1388, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1408, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar родилась в 1360 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия. Её отца звали Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar в 1388 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 октября 1408 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar nació en 1360, en Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland como hija de Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar. Se casó con Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar en 1388, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 26 de octubre de 1408, en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
